name: Impossible Chicken Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate.
3. Layer the cottage cheese and parmesan cheese in the pie plate.
4. Mix the chicken with half of the mozzarella cheese, garlic powder, oregano, basil, and tomato paste.
5. Spoon the mixture over the parmesan cheese.
6. Beat the remaining ingredients in a blender on high for 15 seconds, or by hand for 1 minute until smooth.
7. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
8. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
9. Top with the remaining mozzarella cheese and bake for an additional 5-8 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
